stemHtml: The airspeed indicator of an aircraft is provided with a moving red and white hatched pointer. What does this pointer indicate?

options.a: The speed indicated on the autothrottle control box versus temperature.
options.b: The speed indicated on the autothrottle control box versus altitude.
options.c: The maximum speed in V<sub>MO</sub> operation versus temperature.
options.d: The maximum speed in VMO operation versus altitude.
